hero.title: World-Class Cancer Treatment for Tumor Patients in China
hero.subtitle: Guangzhou University of Chinese Medicine Jinshazhou Hospital offers cutting-edge radiotherapy technology for international tumor patients seeking world-class cancer treatment in China.
stats.1.label: World-Class Radiotherapy Systems
stats.2.label: Hospital Beds

stats.4.label: Cost Savings vs. Western Countries
why.title: Why International Patients Choose Our Center
why.subtitle: We combine world-leading technology with compassionate care, providing a comprehensive cancer treatment experience that rivals the best institutions globally.
why.card1.title: Cutting-Edge Technology
why.card1.text: Home to China's first CyberKnife M6 with AI, TrueBeam, TomoTherapy, Halcyon, and Ethos adaptive radiotherapy platform.
why.card2.title: MDT Team Approach
why.card2.text: Multidisciplinary team including medical oncology, radiotherapy, surgery, interventional therapy, and traditional Chinese medicine.
why.card3.title: Affordable Excellence
why.card3.text: Receive world-class treatment at a fraction of the cost compared to the US, UK, or other Western countries.
why.card4.title: No Waiting Lists
why.card4.text: Immediate access to diagnostics and treatment. Same-week appointments available for most procedures.
why.card5.title: Full Language Support
why.card5.text: Professional medical interpreters and bilingual staff to ensure clear communication throughout your journey.
why.card6.title: Integrated TCM
why.card6.text: Unique integration of modern radiotherapy with traditional Chinese medicine for holistic recovery and better outcomes.
equipment.title: World-Leading Radiotherapy Equipment
equipment.subtitle: Our center has invested in the most advanced radiotherapy systems available globally, ensuring precision, safety, and optimal treatment outcomes for every patient.
equip.1.name: CyberKnife M6
equip.1.subtitle: Accuray CyberKnife M6
equip.1.desc: The 6th generation AI-powered robotic radiosurgery system with real-time tumor tracking and multi-leaf collimator. Treats tumors anywhere in the body with sub-millimeter precision in 1-5 sessions.
equip.2.name: TomoTherapy
equip.2.subtitle: Accuray Helical TomoTherapy
equip.2.desc: Integrates IMRT, IGRT, and DGRT into one system. 360-degree helical delivery with precision targeting accuracy of ±0.1mm, ideal for complex and multiple tumors.
equip.3.name: TrueBeam
equip.3.subtitle: Varian TrueBeam
equip.3.desc: High-precision image-guided linear accelerator with HyperArc technology. Delivers rapid, accurate treatment for a wide range of cancers including lung, liver, prostate, and brain.
equip.4.name: HyperArc
equip.4.subtitle: Intracranial SRS Technology
equip.4.desc: Non-coplanar stereotactic radiosurgery technology specifically for intracranial tumors. Sub-millimeter accuracy treating multiple brain metastases simultaneously in 10 minutes.
equip.5.name: Halcyon
equip.5.subtitle: Varian Halcyon System
equip.5.desc: The world's first medical accelerator with 100% image guidance. Full digitalization, AI-powered, 6-minute complete treatment sessions with high patient comfort and quiet operation.
equip.6.name: Ethos
equip.6.subtitle: AI Adaptive Radiotherapy
equip.6.desc: The world's first online adaptive radiotherapy platform. AI real-time adaptation to daily anatomical changes. Personalized treatment every session for prostate, bladder, cervical, and rectal cancers.
equip.7.name: Brachytherapy
equip.7.subtitle: GammaMedplus IX HDR
equip.7.desc: High Dose Rate afterloader for precise internal radiation. Delivers radioactive sources directly to tumor sites. Short treatment times, outpatient procedures, high safety with minimal side effects.
equip.8.name: MRI + CT Simulation
equip.8.subtitle: 4D MRI & Dual-Energy CT
equip.8.desc: Siemens 3.0T MRI with motion perception, 4D MRI respiratory gating, and dual-energy large-bore CT. Real-time adaptive imaging for precise tumor tracking during treatment.
mdt.title: Multidisciplinary Team (MDT) Model
mdt.subtitle: Our MDT brings together experts from multiple disciplines to create the most effective, personalized treatment plan for every patient.
mdt.item1.title: Radiation Oncology
mdt.item1.text: Expert radiation oncologists using cutting-edge technology including CyberKnife, TrueBeam, and TomoTherapy for precise tumor targeting.
mdt.item2.title: Medical Oncology
mdt.item2.text: Chemotherapy, immunotherapy, and targeted therapy specialists providing systemic treatment solutions.
mdt.item3.title: Surgical Oncology
mdt.item3.text: Experienced surgeons using minimally invasive and robotic techniques for tumor removal when surgery is indicated.
mdt.item4.title: Traditional Chinese Medicine
mdt.item4.text: TCM integration including acupuncture, herbal medicine, and rehabilitation to reduce side effects and improve recovery.
mdt.item5.title: Interventional Therapy
mdt.item5.text: Minimally invasive procedures including TACE, radiofrequency ablation, and particle implantation for localized treatment.
process.title: Your Treatment Journey
process.subtitle: From your first inquiry to post-treatment follow-up, we guide you every step of the way with personalized care and support.
process.step1.title: Free Consultation
process.step1.desc: Share your medical records via WhatsApp. Our team reviews your case and provides a preliminary treatment plan.
process.step2.title: Travel Planning
process.step2.desc: We assist with visa guidance, flight recommendations, and hospital accommodation arrangements.
process.step3.title: Arrival & Diagnosis
process.step3.desc: Airport pickup, comprehensive diagnostics, and MDT consultation to finalize your personalized treatment plan.
process.step4.title: Treatment
process.step4.desc: Receive world-class radiotherapy with daily monitoring, side effect management, and continuous support.
process.step5.title: Follow-Up
process.step5.desc: Complete medical records in English, remote follow-up consultations, and coordination with your home doctors.
testimonials.title: What Our Patients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real stories from international patients who found hope and healing at our center.
testimonials.1.text: After being told I needed to wait 6 months for radiotherapy in my country, I came to Jinshazhou. The CyberKnife treatment was completed in just 3 sessions. The tumor shrank significantly. Incredible technology and caring staff.
testimonials.2.text: The cost was less than half what I would have paid back home, but the technology was even more advanced. The Halcyon system treated my prostate cancer in just 6 minutes per session. The whole experience was smooth and professional.
testimonials.3.text: My brain metastases were treated with HyperArc technology in a single 10-minute session. The precision was remarkable. The team coordinated everything from my arrival to follow-up. I am grateful for this second chance at life.
contact.title: Ready to Start Your Healing Journey?
contact.subtitle: Contact us today for a free consultation. Our international patient coordinator will respond within 24 hours to discuss your case and guide you through the next steps.
contact.transportDetail: Metro Line 6, Hengsha Station Exit C (100m walk)
contact.ctaText: Send us your medical records and we will provide a preliminary assessment within 24 hours.
footer.desc: Guangzhou University of Chinese Medicine Jinshazhou Hospital - A modern tertiary Grade-A hospital integrating medical treatment, teaching, scientific research, and preventive healthcare.
